pi_items.source: Task.json description explicitly specifies this as the sequence name to create
Task.json description explicitly specifies this as the prefix for the new sequence
Task.json description explicitly specifies 'Start No: 1000' and 'Current Next: 1000' for the sequence
Task.json description specifies 'Document Type named Purchase Order'. Setup and export scripts query for this document type, indicating it exists in GardenWorld seed data.

docker-compose.yml specifies image: idempiereofficial/idempiere:12-release. Verified via GitHub: https://github.com/idempiere/idempiere-docker and Docker Hub: https://hub.docker.com/r/idempiereofficial/idempiere

Setup script and task_utils.sh reference GardenWorld client explicitly. Verified via iDempiere documentation (https://wiki.idempiere.org/en/Official_iDempiere_Docker) that GardenWorld is the default demo company in seed data.

pi_items.verified_value: Synthetic seeded database - automatically created by iDempiere on first launch with standard GardenWorld demo data
pi_items.source: Setup_idempiere.sh line 52 comments: 'First launch seeds the GardenWorld demo database'. Confirmed via https://github.com/idempiere/idempiere-docker README: iDempiere creates seed database automatically if it doesn't exist.

pi_items.verified_value: ERP configuration task - creating a document sequence and linking it to a document type
pi_items.source: Task.json description and verifier.py define the task as creating an AD_SEQUENCE record and updating C_DOCTYPE to link the new sequence

privileged_info_summary: Task uses iDempiere 12-release, a real open-source ERP system, with the GardenWorld synthetic demo database. All metadata values are task specifications matching the explicit requirements: create sequence 'Purchase Order 2025' with prefix 'PO25-' and start number 1000, then link it to the existing 'Purchase Order' document type. Data is synthetic, sourced from iDempiere's standard seed database. Features (Document Sequences, Document Types) are real iDempiere functionality.
